message:
fix: use json.Marshal for Anthropic tool result content instead of fmt.Sprint

fmt.Sprint on structured content (maps, slices) produces Go debug format
like "map[key:value]" which is garbage to the LLM. Now uses a type switch
matching the OpenAI adapter pattern: strings pass through, everything else
gets json.Marshal'd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
